bias.description: raw stock-public-C-API CTAS omits package verification, receipt, checkpoint, and destination mirror work
DuckDB has 16 internal threads while the canonical IPC scanner is independently fixed at the product-admitted width of 2

reference.name: stock_libduckdb_public_c_api_table_function
reference.semantic_work: CTAS from the same finalized canonical LZ4 IPC segments with identical row-key derivation; excludes CDF verification, transaction metadata, receipt, and checkpoint work

status.error: isolated benchmark child exited unsuccessfully with code 2; stderr: cdf-p3-lab: DuckDB raw query failed: Binder Error: DuckDB Arrow IPC table-function does not support Arrow type List(Field { name: "element", data_type: Utf8, nullable: true, metadata: {"cdf:source_name": "element", "cdf:iceberg_required": "false", "cdf:physical_type": "string", "PARQUET:field_id": "2043", "cdf:iceberg_field_id": "2043"} }) in this falsification LINE 1: ...(1 + "_cdf_package_row_ord" AS UBIGINT) AS "_cdf_row_key" FROM cdf_arrow_ipc_scan() ^; DuckDB reference profile capture also failed: No such file or directory (os error 2)
